channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Novara Media: Burnham Launches Byelection Campaign
The Guardian: Wes Streeting insists he can win Labour leadership race despite ‘underdog’ status - The Guardian
item.description: Wes Streeting insists he can win Labour leadership race despite ‘underdog’ status - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Community cafe demands apology from Farage for ‘intimidating’ uninvited visit

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): UK pitched single market for goods with EU in pursuit of deeper trade ties
item.description: UK pitched single market for goods with EU in pursuit of deeper trade ties

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Britain will be ungovernable until democratic consent is restored | Letter
item.description: Britain will be ungovernable until democratic consent is restored | Letter

item.title: The Mirror: EXCLUSIVE: Wes Streeting pledges to bring back Sure Start funded by wealth tax in leadership pitch - The Mirror

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Burnham says politics ‘needs new script’ and vows to change Labour if elected as Makerfield MP – as it happened

item.title: BBC Politics: UK net migration needs to fall further, says Andy Burnham
